mapper.select:
SELECT ai.id, ai.title, ai.cover_path AS coverUrl, ai.duration, ai.creator_id AS creatorId, ai.create_time AS submitTime, u.nickname AS creatorName, t.full_text AS transcript FROM audio_info ai LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ai.creator_id = u.id LEFT JOIN audio_transcript t ON ai.id = t.audio_id WHERE ai.is_deleted = 0
AND ai.audit_status = 0
AND ai.audit_status = 1
AND ai.audit_status = 2
ORDER BY ai.create_time DESC

SELECT ai.id, ai.title, ai.cover_path AS coverUrl, u.nickname AS creatorName, ai.play_count AS playCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audio_folder_relation WHERE audio_id = ai.id) AS collectCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audio_like WHERE audio_id = ai.id) AS likeCount, ai.duration, ai.price, ai.is_paid AS isPaid, ai.visibility, ai.status, ai.reject_reason AS rejectReason, ai.create_time AS createTime FROM audio_info ai INNER JOIN sys_user u ON ai.creator_id = u.id WHERE ai.creator_id = #{userId} AND ai.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ai.create_time DESC
